## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New primitive or behavior (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (alters observable behavior of an existing primitive)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `spec/` updated if observable behavior changed
- [ ] `conformance/probes/` updated if the behavioral surface changed
- [ ] `pyright src/substrate tests` is clean (from `python/`)
- [ ] `pylint src/substrate tests` is clean (from `python/`)
- [ ] No `# provenance:` comments or framework-metaphysics references in source
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
